recommendations.title: The Villainess

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Memoir of a Murderer
recommendations.overview: A former serial killer with Alzheimer's fights to protect his daughter from her mysterious boyfriend who may be a serial killer too.

recommendations.title: Memories of Murder
recommendations.overview: A sadistic serial rapist and murderer of young women terrorizes a small province in 1980s South Korea. To prevent further crimes, three increasingly desperate detectives with conflicting methods race against time to unravel the violent mind of the ki

recommendations.title: Carter
recommendations.overview: Carter, who awakens two months into a deadly pandemic originating from the DMZ that has already devastated US and North Korea. He who has no recollections of his past finds a mysterious device in his head, and a lethal bomb in his mouth. A voice in h

recommendations.title: The Yellow Sea
recommendations.overview: A Korean man in China takes an assassination job in South Korea to make money and find his missing wife. But when the job is botched, he is forced to go on the run from the police and the gangsters who paid him.

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys: Reign of Chaos
recommendations.overview: A respectable village head decides to keep his son away from the violent politics of rural life. However, fate intervenes, forcing the young man to not only return home, but also take up the sickle.

recommendations.title: Hangman
recommendations.overview: A homicide detective teams up with a criminal profiler to catch a serial killer whose crimes are inspired by the children's game, Hangman.

recommendations.title: Blitz
recommendations.overview: A tough cop is dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers.

recommendations.title: The House That Jack Built
recommendations.overview: Failed architect, engineer and vicious murderer Jack narrates the details of some of his most elaborately orchestrated crimes, each of them a towering piece of art that defines his life's work as a serial killer for twelve years.
